tools.title: Obsidian Extensions
tools.description: Plugins that help you structure notes, retrieve resources, and keep a cleaner knowledge workflow.

dashboard.title: YouTube Workflow

support.title: Training and Support
support.description: The site, the training, and the documentation move together to explain what is available and how to use it well.
